mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO im_offline_events_content ( id, user_id, global_seq, event_type, event_content, create_time, update_time, expire_time ) VALUES
( #{event.id}, #{event.userId}, #{event.globalSeq}, #{event.eventType}, #{event.eventContent}, #{event.createTime}, #{event.updateTime}, #{event.expireTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, global_seq, event_type, event_content, create_time, update_time, expire_time FROM im_offline_events_content WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND global_seq > #{lastSequence} ORDER BY global_seq ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_offline_events_delivery ( id, user_id, device_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, delivery_status, delivery_count, last_delivery_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{lastSyncSeq}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryCount}, #{lastDeliveryTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, device_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, delivery_status, delivery_count, last_delivery_time, create_time, update_time FROM im_offline_events_delivery WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND device_id = #{deviceId}

SELECT id, user_id, device_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, delivery_status, delivery_count, last_delivery_time, create_time, update_time FROM im_offline_events_delivery WHERE delivery_status IN (1, 4, 5) -- 未投递、推送MQ失败、送达失败 AND delivery_count < 5 -- 投递次数少于5次 AND (last_delivery_time IS NULL OR last_delivery_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)) ORDER BY user_id, device_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT user_id as userId, COUNT(*) as totalCount, MAX(global_seq) as maxSequence, MIN(create_time) as earliestTime, MAX(create_time) as latestTime FROM im_offline_events_content WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id
